title: ClientPurchaseRecord
description: Implementation of the 'ClientPurchaseRecord' model. A record of a specific client purchase

Sale.description: Contains details about the sale and payment for a purchase event.

Description.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

AccountPayment.description: If `true`, the item was a payment credited to an account.

Price.description: The price paid for the item.

AmountPaid.description: The amount paid for the item.

Discount.description: The discount amount that was applied to the item.

Tax.description: The amount of tax that was applied to the item.

Returned.description: The return status of the item. If `true`, this item was returned.

Quantity.description: The quantity of the item purchased.
